name: Ur-Energy Inc.
description: Ur-Energy Inc. is a junior uranium mining company operating the Lost Creek in-situ recovery (ISR) uranium facility in south-central Wyoming. The company is engaged in the identification, acquisition, exploration, development, and operation of uranium projects. Since its inception, Ur-Energy has focused on low-cost, environmentally friendly ISR mining techniques to produce uranium oxide (U3O8). With a portfolio of projects primarily located in Wyoming, the company maintains a strong operational presence in the United States, aiming to provide a reliable domestic source of fuel for the nuclear power industry.
